productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Classic Purple Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of blended fabric for durability Has one main zippered and magnetic closure compartment Two inner zippered compartments with organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short removable mat design handles for carrying ease Two zippered compartments on the sides for additional space Quilted look with patent glossy panels and legs at the mouth legs at the base Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
